div.h1: Clean Detach on SIGINT — The Cleanup Dance

p.strong: Without cleanup: tracee stuck in T state (SIGKILL only)

g.text: Requires | tracee must be in T (stopped) state
Signal | pass 0 — no signal injected on resume
If ESRCH | tracee is running — SIGSTOP it first

text.tspan: /* pid is RUNNING — must stop first */
/* pid is RUNNING — must stop first */

g.text: continue; /* SIGINT interrupted waitpid → re-check flag */

text.tspan: NOTE: times include ptrace context-switch overhead (~2-10us each)
Relative ratios meaningful; absolute values are NOT wall-clock cost */
NOTE: times include ptrace context-switch overhead (~2-10us each)
Relative ratios meaningful; absolute values are NOT wall-clock cost */

g.text: Use ratios for comparison, NOT absolute ns
eBPF avoids this: runs inside kernel (~200ns)
ps shows tracee: R or S (normal)
2. BUT tracee was at ptrace stop (T state)
